documentation.value: Set the base image for subsequent instructions. Every Dockerfile must start with FROM (except ARG before FROM).
Execute a command in a new layer on top of the current image and commit the result.
Provide defaults for an executing container. Only one CMD per Dockerfile; the last one wins.
Add metadata key-value pairs to the image.
Set the Author field of the generated image. Deprecated in favor of LABEL.
Inform Docker that the container listens on the specified network ports at runtime.
Set an environment variable that persists in the built image and running containers.
Copy files, directories, or remote URLs into the image filesystem. Automatically extracts tar archives.
Copy files or directories from the build context into the image filesystem.
Configure a container that will run as an executable.
Create a mount point with the specified name and mark it as holding externally mounted volumes.
Set the user name or UID (and optionally group) to use for RUN, CMD, and ENTRYPOINT instructions.
Set the working directory for RUN, CMD, ENTRYPOINT, COPY, and ADD instructions.
Define a build-time variable that users can pass with --build-arg.
Add a trigger instruction that executes when the image is used as a base for another build.
Set the system call signal that will be sent to the container to exit.
Tell Docker how to test a container to check that it is still working.
Override the default shell used for the shell form of commands.
Basic FROM with image name.
FROM with explicit image tag.
FROM with AS alias for multi-stage builds.
FROM with explicit platform for cross-compilation.
FROM with platform and stage alias.
Start from an empty image, used for statically linked binaries.
Execute command in shell form (/bin/sh -c).
Execute command in exec form (no shell processing).
Mount a persistent cache directory for package managers.
Bind mount a directory from the build context.
Mount a secret file without persisting in the image layer.
Forward SSH agent for private repo access during build.
Mount a tmpfs for temporary scratch space.
Run multi-line script using heredoc syntax (BuildKit).

completions.label: RUN apt-get install

documentation.value: Best practice apt-get install: update + install + clean in one layer.

completions.insertText:
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ${1:package1} \
    ${2:package2} \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

documentation.value: Install Python packages with no cache for smaller images.
Install Node.js dependencies for reproducible builds.
Install packages on Alpine Linux.
Run command with network disabled for security.
Run with elevated privileges (requires security.insecure entitlement).
Create a non-root user for running the application.
Create a non-root user on Alpine.
Set default command in exec form (preferred).
Set default command in shell form.
Provide default parameters to ENTRYPOINT.
Set entrypoint in exec form (preferred).
Set entrypoint in shell form.
Use tini as PID 1 for proper signal handling.
Use dumb-init as PID 1 for signal forwarding.
Copy files from build context into the image.
Copy files and set ownership.
Copy files and set permissions (BuildKit).
Copy files from a named build stage (multi-stage).
Copy files using link mode for better cache efficiency.

completions.label: COPY package*.json

documentation.value: Copy only package files first for better layer caching.
Add files from build context (or URL/tar) into the image.
Download a file from a URL into the image.
Add and auto-extract a tar archive.
Add file with SHA256 checksum verification (BuildKit).
Set a single environment variable.
Set multiple environment variables.
Prepend a directory to PATH.
Set Node.js production environment.
Common Python env vars for Docker.
Define a build-time argument.
Define a build arg with a default value.
Define ARG before FROM for use in FROM instruction.
Expose a single port.
Expose multiple ports.
Expose a UDP port.
Create a mount point.
Create multiple mount points.
Switch to a non-root user.
Switch to a specific UID:GID.
Set the working directory.
Add a single metadata label.
Add multiple metadata labels.
OCI image spec annotation labels.
Health check with HTTP endpoint.
Health check using wget (for alpine/minimal images).
Disable health check inherited from base image.
Set default shell to bash.
Set default shell to PowerShell (Windows).
Set BuildKit frontend syntax (must be first line).
Change the escape character (must be before any instruction).

completions.label: Dockerfile: Node.js multi-stage

documentation.value: Production-ready multi-stage Dockerfile for a Node.js application.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM node:${1:20}-alpine AS deps
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production

FROM node:${1:20}-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

FROM node:${1:20}-alpine
WORKDIR /app
ENV NODE_ENV=production
RUN addgroup -S appuser && adduser -S appuser -G appuser
COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY package*.json ./
USER appuser
EXPOSE ${2:3000}
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD wget --quiet --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:${2:3000}/health || exit 1
CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: Python multi-stage

documentation.value: Production-ready multi-stage Dockerfile for a Python application.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM python:${1:3.12}-slim AS builder
WORKDIR /app
ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --prefix=/install -r requirements.txt

FROM python:${1:3.12}-slim
WORKDIR /app
ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
RUN groupadd -r appuser && useradd -r -g appuser appuser
COPY --from=builder /install /usr/local
COPY . .
USER appuser
EXPOSE ${2:8000}
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:${2:8000}/health')" || exit 1
CMD ["python", "-m", "${3:app}"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: Go multi-stage

documentation.value: Production-ready multi-stage Dockerfile for a Go application.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM golang:${1:1.22}-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o /app/server ./cmd/${2:server}

FROM gcr.io/distroless/static-debian12
COPY --from=builder /app/server /server
EXPOSE ${3:8080}
USER nonroot:nonroot
ENTRYPOINT ["/server"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: Java Maven multi-stage

documentation.value: Production-ready multi-stage Dockerfile for a Java application built with Maven.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM maven:${1:3.9}-eclipse-temurin-${2:21} AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY pom.xml .
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B
COPY src ./src
RUN mvn package -DskipTests -B

FROM eclipse-temurin:${2:21}-jre-alpine
WORKDIR /app
RUN addgroup -S appuser && adduser -S appuser -G appuser
COPY --from=builder /app/target/*.jar app.jar
USER appuser
EXPOSE ${3:8080}
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD wget --quiet --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:${3:8080}/actuator/health || exit 1
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: Rust multi-stage

documentation.value: Production-ready multi-stage Dockerfile for a Rust application.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM rust:${1:1.77}-slim AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY Cargo.toml Cargo.lock ./
RUN mkdir src && echo "fn main() {}" > src/main.rs && cargo build --release && rm -rf src
COPY src ./src
RUN cargo build --release

FROM debian:${2:bookworm}-slim
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN groupadd -r appuser && useradd -r -g appuser appuser
COPY --from=builder /app/target/release/${3:myapp} /usr/local/bin/
USER appuser
EXPOSE ${4:8080}
ENTRYPOINT ["${3:myapp}"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: .NET multi-stage

documentation.value: Production-ready multi-stage Dockerfile for a .NET application.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:${1:8.0} AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY *.csproj .
RUN dotnet restore
COPY . .
RUN dotnet publish -c Release -o /out --no-restore

FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspnet:${1:8.0}
WORKDIR /app
RUN groupadd -r appuser && useradd -r -g appuser appuser
COPY --from=builder /out .
USER appuser
EXPOSE ${2:8080}
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://localhost:${2:8080}/health || exit 1
ENTRYPOINT ["dotnet", "${3:MyApp}.dll"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: Nginx static site

documentation.value: Serve static files with Nginx using a multi-stage build.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM node:${1:20}-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

FROM nginx:${2:alpine}
COPY --from=builder /app/${3:dist} /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY ${4:nginx.conf} /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
EXPOSE 80
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://localhost/ || exit 1
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: PHP-FPM

documentation.value: PHP-FPM application Dockerfile with Composer.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM composer:${1:2} AS vendor
WORKDIR /app
COPY composer.json composer.lock ./
RUN composer install --no-dev --no-scripts --no-autoloader
COPY . .
RUN composer dump-autoload --optimize

FROM php:${2:8.3}-fpm-alpine
WORKDIR /var/www/html
RUN docker-php-ext-install pdo pdo_mysql opcache
COPY --from=vendor /app .
RUN chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html
USER www-data
EXPOSE 9000
CMD ["php-fpm"]

completions.label: Dockerfile: Ruby/Rails

documentation.value: Production-ready Dockerfile for a Ruby on Rails application.

completions.insertText:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM ruby:${1:3.3}-slim AS builder
WORKDIR /app
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential libpq-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
COPY Gemfile Gemfile.lock ./
RUN bundle config set --local deployment true \
    && bundle config set --local without "development test" \
    && bundle install

FROM ruby:${1:3.3}-slim
WORKDIR /app
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    libpq5 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN groupadd -r rails && useradd -r -g rails rails
COPY --from=builder /app/vendor/bundle ./vendor/bundle
COPY . .
RUN bundle config set --local path vendor/bundle
USER rails
EXPOSE ${2:3000}
CMD ["bundle", "exec", "rails", "server", "-b", "0.0.0.0"]

completions.label: Non-root user setup

documentation.value: Best practice: create and switch to a non-root user.

completions.label: apt-get best practice

documentation.value: Install packages and clean up in a single layer.

completions.insertText:
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        ${1:curl} \
        ${2:ca-certificates} \
    && apt-get purge -y --auto-remove -o APT::AutoRemove::RecommendsImportant=false \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

completions.label: pip best practice

documentation.value: Install Python packages without cache.

completions.insertText:
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip \
    && pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

completions.label: npm ci pattern

documentation.value: Install production Node.js dependencies.

completions.insertText:
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production \
    && npm cache clean --force

completions.label: Multi-stage build pattern

documentation.value: Basic multi-stage build skeleton.
Use Google distroless as the final minimal image.

completions.label: Signal handling (tini)

documentation.value: Use tini init for proper PID 1 signal handling.

completions.insertText:
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends tini \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
ENTRYPOINT ["tini", "--"]
CMD ["${1:node}", "${2:server.js}"]

completions.label: Build cache optimization

documentation.value: Copy dependency files before source for cache optimization.
Minimal 5MB Alpine Linux base image.
Node.js on Alpine Linux.
Node.js on Debian slim.
Python on Debian slim.
Python on Alpine Linux.
Go on Alpine Linux.
Ubuntu base image.
Minimal Debian base image.
Nginx on Alpine Linux.
Google distroless static image (no shell).

Copy files preserving parent directory structure (BuildKit).

```dockerfile
COPY --parents src/app/config.json /app/
# Creates /app/src/app/config.json
```

Clone and keep the .git directory (BuildKit).

```dockerfile
ADD --keep-git-dir=true https://github.com/user/repo.git /src
```

Recommended .dockerignore contents to reduce build context.

```
# .dockerignore
node_modules
.git
.env
*.md
Dockerfile*
docker-compose*
.dockerignore
.vscode
__pycache__
*.pyc
.tox
.coverage
dist
build
```

Create files inline using heredoc syntax (BuildKit).

```dockerfile
COPY <<EOF /app/config.json
{"key": "value"}
EOF
```

completions.label: RUN pipe pattern
completions.detail: RUN with pipe and set -o pipefail

documentation.value:
Use pipefail for reliable pipe error detection.

```dockerfile
RUN set -o pipefail && curl -fsSL https://example.com/install.sh | bash
```
